PolicyStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | ACTIVE | UPDATING | DELETING | CREATE_FAILED | UPDATE_FAILED | DELETE_FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyDefinition.description: The definition structure for policies. Encapsulates different policy formats.
PolicyDefinition.markdownDescription:
The definition structure for policies. Encapsulates different policy formats.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CedarPolicy.description: A Cedar policy statement within the AgentCore Policy system.

Statement.description: The Cedar policy statement that defines the authorization logic.
Statement.markdownDescription:
The Cedar policy statement that defines the authorization logic.

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 35  
Maximum Length: 10000  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyStatement.markdownDescription:
A policy statement within the AgentCore Policy system.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

EnforcementMode.description: Whether the policy contributes to the enforce decision returned to Gateway. LOG_ONLY policies are still evaluated but their decisions are observed only, allowing customers to validate a policy against real traffic before promoting it.
EnforcementMode.markdownDescription:
Whether the policy contributes to the enforce decision returned to Gateway. LOG_ONLY policies are still evaluated but their decisions are observed only, allowing customers to validate a policy against real traffic before promoting it.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACTIVE | LOG_ONLY  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyValidationMode.description: The validation mode for the policy. Determines how Cedar analyzer validation results are handled.
PolicyValidationMode.markdownDescription:
The validation mode for the policy. Determines how Cedar analyzer validation results are handled.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: FAIL_ON_ANY_FINDINGS | IGNORE_ALL_FINDINGS  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyEngineId.description: The identifier of the policy engine which contains this policy.
PolicyEngineId.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the policy engine which contains this policy.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 12  
Maximum Length: 59  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*-[a-z0-9_]{10}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Name.description: The customer-assigned immutable name for the policy. Must be unique within the policy engine.
Name.markdownDescription:
The customer-assigned immutable name for the policy. Must be unique within the policy engine.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 48  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.description: A human-readable description of the policy's purpose and functionality.
Description.markdownDescription:
A human-readable description of the policy's purpose and functionality.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 4096  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyId.markdownDescription:

Read only property: Yes

PolicyArn.markdownDescription:

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 96  
Maximum Length: 203

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
